svg.title: MycoPortal Agent Data Flow Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end data flow from user query through five pipeline stages to artifact output, showing all modules, decision branches, and external integrations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of queries can I send to the MycoPortal agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the server.py entrypoint work?')
sendPrompt('How does the MycoPortal planner work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the planner needs clarification?')
sendPrompt('How does the MycoPortal extractor work?')
sendPrompt('What extraction schemas are defined in the models?')
sendPrompt('What does the resolver stage do in v1?')
sendPrompt('How does the router map extraction output to API params?')
sendPrompt('What Pydantic validators are in the param models?')
sendPrompt('How does the executor prioritize must_call vs optional tools?')
sendPrompt('What tool modules exist in execution/tools/?')
sendPrompt('What does the common artifact helper do?')
sendPrompt('How does the MycoPortal API client work?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the MycoPortal API expose?')
sendPrompt('What does a MycoPortal agent artifact contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the iChatBio ResponseContext work?')
sendPrompt('Which LLM model is used by the planner and extractor?')
sendPrompt('How does the config loader work in common/config.py?')
